name: recently_added
description: Recently Added view for Volumio's local music library — uses MPD's built-in modified-since query
author: Zhapox

volumio_info.details: Adds a 'Recently Added' entry to the Browse menu showing albums added to your library within configurable time windows. Reads directly from MPD's database — no separate index, no watcher, no native modules.
volumio_info.changelog: v0.4.1: tile name now translates with the rest of the UI — DE 'Kürzlich hinzugefügt', FR 'Ajouts récents', IT 'Aggiunti di recente', ES 'Añadidos recientemente', NL 'Recent toegevoegd', PL 'Ostatnio dodane'. Note: the tile name is registered at plugin start, so changing Volumio's UI language requires a plugin restart for the tile to update (the breadcrumb and list titles update immediately on each browse). Bundled README screenshots into docs/images/. v0.4.0: full multilingual UI — new translations for German, French, Italian, Spanish, Dutch, Polish (matching the OLED plugin's language set). All user-visible strings (settings, browse headers, plurals, errors, toasts) are now translated; UI language follows Volumio's language_code automatically. README documentation added.
